title: nasturtium glastifolium
intro: Nasturtium glastifolium, also known as Garden Cress or Indian Cress, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its peppery flavor and medicinal properties. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in vitamins A, C, and E, and minerals like calcium and iron, offering various health benefits such as boosting immunity, improving skin health, and supporting eye health. In herbal preparations, Nasturtium glastifolium is often used as a fresh or dried herb, or made into a tea, tincture, or salve, to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
